name: Pumpkin-Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the pumpkin, sugar, spices, and salt. Mix well.
2. Add the eggs and evaporated milk. Beat until smooth using a rotary beater or electric mixer.
3. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
4. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
5. Bake for 15 minutes at 425°F (220°C), then reduce temperature to 350°F (175°C) and bake for an additional 45 minutes, or until a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean. Cool on a wire rack.
6. Prepare the crunchy pecan topping: In another bowl, mix softened butter, brown sugar, and pecans until crumbly with a fork.
7. Sprinkle the topping over the cooled pie.
8. Place the pie under the broiler (5 inches from heat source) for about 1 minute, or until the mixture begins to bubble. Cool to room temperature on a wire rack.
